title: bolanthus filicaulis
intro: Bolanthus filicaulis, also known as the Alpine Cat's Foot, is a perennial plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Bolanthus filicaulis include reducing inflammation and improving gut health, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also sometimes used in traditional folk remedies.
